name: @maria-ms/storybook-web
description: Storybook for Maria design system Web Components.

scripts.check: node --check .storybook/main.mjs && node --check .storybook/preview.mjs && node --check src/button.stories.mjs && node --check src/checkbox.stories.mjs && node --check src/field.stories.mjs && node --check src/icon-button.stories.mjs && node --check src/number-input.stories.mjs && node --check src/radio.stories.mjs && node --check src/select.stories.mjs && node --check src/spinner.stories.mjs && node --check src/text-input.stories.mjs && node --check src/textarea.stories.mjs
